Fully Offline · No API Key · Local Model

Enhance any image. No cloud.

OpenCV sharpens. Pillow upscales 4×. NumPy kills the noise.Zero internet in.

01 Upscale

Four times
the resolution.

Every pixel reconstructed using Lanczos algorithm with NumPy-powered injection. Your 1170×1545 photo becomes 4680×6180. No hallucination. Pure mathematical upscaling.

4x

megapixels output

Scale Selector
1×
2×
4×
1170 × 1545
↓
4680 × 6180
02 Sharpening

Crisp edges.
Zero ringing.

Edges are detected via Laplacian convolution. The result: sharp without the halo artifacts that destroy lesser upscalers.

Sharpness Score26%
